title: erigeron daenensis
intro: Erigeron daenensis, also known as Korean fleabane, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in Korean medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system. Erigeron daenensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a versatile natural remedy for maintaining overall well-being.
